nasb.text: Complete darkness is held in reserve for his treasures, And unfanned fire will devour him; It will consume the survivor in his tent.

esv.text: Utter darkness is laid up for his treasures; a fire not fanned will devour him; what is left in his tent will be consumed.

cnv.text: 萬般黑暗為他的財寶留存， 不是由人吹著的火要吞滅他， 要毀掉他帳棚中所剩下的。

ccb.text: 他的财宝消失在幽冥中， 天火要吞噬他， 焚毁他帐篷中残留的一切。
